---
title: "weir_design_data_handle"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# 把表 5.1-2 的核心欄位手動建成 data.frame
# （之後可以從 xlsx 讀，先用這個）

weir_design_flow <- tibble(
  month = rep(1:12, each = 3),
  period = rep(c("early", "mid", "late"), 12),
  tendays = 1:36,
  
  # 第二攔河堰（W2）
  W2_before_cms = c(
    2.13, 2.01, 1.99,   # Jan
    1.84, 1.88, 1.85,   # Feb
    1.78, 1.66, 1.71,   # Mar
    1.63, 1.65, 1.58,   # Apr
    1.86, 2.35, 3.38,   # May
    3.22, 3.50, 3.52,   # Jun
    3.14, 4.88, 6.53,   # Jul
    4.13, 3.30, 4.29,   # Aug
    6.86, 6.82, 8.62,   # Sep
    8.17, 6.15, 6.00,   # Oct
    4.18, 3.74, 2.83,   # Nov
    2.36, 2.12, 1.98    # Dec
  ),
  
  W2_after_cms = c(
    0.06, 0.06, 0.06,
    0.06, 0.06, 0.06,
    0.06, 0.06, 0.06,
    0.06, 0.08, 0.06,
    0.06, 0.15, 0.63,
    0.39, 0.59, 0.94,
    0.66, 2.26, 3.36,
    1.44, 0.68, 1.41,
    3.32, 2.74, 4.05,
    3.80, 2.18, 2.53,
    1.18, 0.94, 0.06,
    0.07, 0.06, 0.06
  ),
  
  # 第一攔河堰（W1）
  W1_before_cms = c(
    10.36, 9.80, 9.67,
    9.16, 9.37, 9.24,
    8.71, 8.11, 8.33,
    7.86, 7.98, 7.63,
    7.87, 9.94, 14.29,
    17.54, 19.07, 19.21,
    15.68, 24.36, 32.59,
    30.97, 24.74, 32.11,
    41.28, 40.99, 51.81,
    44.88, 33.76, 32.97,
    23.02, 20.58, 15.55,
    12.11, 10.88, 10.12
  ),
  
  W1_after_cms = c(
    0.48, 0.48, 0.48,
    0.48, 0.48, 0.48,
    0.48, 0.48, 0.48,
    0.48, 0.60, 0.48,
    0.48, 0.89, 2.94,
    2.98, 4.08, 6.13,
    3.95, 12.27, 17.97,
    14.99, 8.35, 14.82,
    23.34, 21.14, 29.74,
    24.40, 14.76, 16.14,
    7.49, 6.09, 1.67,
    0.63, 0.54, 0.49
  )
) |>
  mutate(
    W2_diversion_cms = W2_before_cms - W2_after_cms,
    W1_diversion_cms = W1_before_cms - W1_after_cms,
    W2_capture_rate  = W2_diversion_cms / W2_before_cms,
    W1_capture_rate  = W1_diversion_cms / W1_before_cms
  )

write_csv(weir_design_flow, here("data", "weir_design_flow.csv"))

# 快速確認
cat("W2 mean annual flow before diversion:", 
    round(mean(weir_design_flow$W2_before_cms), 2), "cms\n")
cat("W1 mean annual flow before diversion:", 
    round(mean(weir_design_flow$W1_before_cms), 2), "cms\n")
cat("W2 mean capture rate:", 
    round(mean(weir_design_flow$W2_capture_rate) * 100, 1), "%\n")
cat("W1 mean capture rate:", 
    round(mean(weir_design_flow$W1_capture_rate) * 100, 1), "%\n")

```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
